rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH VS. CARL ERNST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, SEPTEMBER 26, 2007, LINE 13. DEFENDANTS PIER 38 MARITIME RECREATION CENTER, INC. AND CARL ERNST, JR.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE FACTS ARE UNDISPUTED. THIS LEASE DIFFERS FROM THAT IN FOLBERG V CLARA G. R. KINNEY (1980) 104 CAL. APP. 3D 136 IN THAT THIS LEASE DOES NOT WAIVE "ANY NOTICE REQUIRED BY ANY STATUTE". THE NOTICE PROVISION AT ISSUE SUPPLEMENTS BUT DOES NOT SUPPLANT THE OTHERWISE APPLICABLE NOTICE PROVISION OF C.C.P. SECTION 1162(2). =(302/PJM)
